title: Law on Amendment to the Law on Anti-Corruption_ 110801
title_en: Law on Amendment to the Law on Anti-Corruption_ 110801
short_name: Law on Amendment to the Law on Anti-Corruption_ 110801

provisions.title: (bis): Proclamation (Prakas) of the Chairman of the National Council against Corruption
provisions.content:
The Chairman of the National Council against Corruption shall issue Prakas to organize/prepare structure

of the Anti-Corruption Unit from the subordinate department level, and the appointment, changes,

termination of duty of the framework officials of the Anti-Corruption Institution commencing from the

subordinate department level as requested by the Chairman of Anti-Corruption Unit.

provisions.title: (New): Budget and Resources of the Anti-Corruption Institution
provisions.content:
The Anti-corruption Institution has a separate budget package for its work operation and the package is

within the national budget. The Anti-Corruption Institution shall receive the needed resources from the

government, shall have the right to receive donations or assistances from national and international

organizations. The Anti-Corruption Institution will not receive any assistance which leads to a conflict of

interest.

The Chairman of the Anti-Corruption Unit shall be the principal manager.

The management and organization of budget of the Anti-Corruption Institution shall be determined by

Sub-Decree.

provisions.title: shall be deleted.
provisions.content:
Article Two:

This Law is declared to be urgent.

Made in the Royal Palace, Phnom Penh: 01 August 2011.

Sealed and signed: Norodom Sihakmony

Have submitted to the King for signature

Prime Minister

Samdech Akkak Moha Sena Padei Techor Hun Sen

Have submitted to Samdech Akkak Moha

Sena Padei Hun Sen

The Prime Minister

of the Kingdom of Cambodia

Senior Minister in charge of special mission
and Head of the Anti-Corruption Unit

Signed: Om Yinteang
